values.title: Migrate auth middleware off session-token storage
values.description: Implements PROJ-419. Replaces the session-token lookup with a JWT verification path. Adds Redis-backed revocation list. Migration drops the session_tokens table.

values.title: Hotfix: Redis lookup timeout in token-validation path
values.description: Adds a 200ms timeout to the Redis lookup that authentication middleware does on every request. Fixes the prod outage from 2026-01-14.
